Description: Uses labeled datasets to train algorithms to classify data or predict outcomes. The model learns from known examples where both the input and output are known.
Key Concepts or Algorithms: Linear Regression, Decision Trees, Random Forests, Support Vector Machines (SVM), Neural Networks
Common Use Cases: Email spam detection, Image classification, Price prediction, Medical diagnosis
Prerequisites (Inferred): Python programming, Linear algebra, Statistics, NumPy, Pandas

Description: Finds patterns in data without pre-labeled responses. The system discovers hidden patterns or groupings in the data on its own.
Key Concepts or Algorithms: K-Means Clustering, Principal Component Analysis (PCA), Autoencoders, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs)
Common Use Cases: Customer segmentation, Anomaly detection, Recommendation systems, Data visualization
Prerequisites (Inferred): Python programming, Linear algebra, Statistics, NumPy, Pandas

Description: Uses artificial neural networks with multiple layers to progressively extract higher-level features from raw input.
Key Concepts or Algorithms: Neural Network Architecture (Input Layer, Hidden Layers, Output Layer), Artificial Neural Networks
Common Use Cases: Image classification, Recommendation systems, Autonomous vehicles
Prerequisites (Inferred): Python programming, Linear algebra, Statistics, Calculus, Neural network theory

Description: Trains an agent to make sequential decisions by rewarding desirable behaviors and penalizing undesirable ones.
Common Use Cases: Game playing (Chess, Go), Robotics, Autonomous vehicles, Resource management
Prerequisites (Inferred): Python programming, Linear algebra, Statistics, Decision-making logic
